name: codex-aidp-workbench
description: Codex skills for Oracle AI Data Platform Workbench operations through the AIDP CLI and OCI-authenticated REST APIs.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Oracle AI Data Platform Workbench from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin with skills for Oracle AI Data Platform Workbench: clusters, catalog discovery, Spark SQL, Delta Lake DDL and DML, ingestion, pipelines, governance, MLOps, agent flows, and workspace operations. It uses the official aidp CLI where available and OCI-authenticated REST fallbacks where documented.
defaultPrompt: List my AIDP workspaces and clusters.
Create an AIDP Spark cluster with defaults.
Explore my AIDP catalog schemas and tables.
